## Checklist

- [ ] I've read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] If this adds/modifies a prompt in `/prompts`, it follows the 7-part structure in `docs/prompt-guide.md` (Purpose, Inputs, Outputs, Best Practices, Common Mistakes, When to Use, Example)
- [ ] If this adds/modifies a stage prompt, the input/output contract is preserved (or downstream files are updated to match — see `docs/prompt-guide.md#modifying-a-prompt`)
- [ ] If this adds an industry example, all names/companies/data are clearly fictional composites, not real people or private data
- [ ] If this adds a tool workflow, no real API keys, tokens, or account-specific screenshots are included
- [ ] I've added an entry to `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] I've checked that internal links to other repo files are correct

## Anything else reviewers should know?
